text: - Hello? - Hello? - Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through North Carolina State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? - Yes. - Oh, okay, great. So the notification has all the details and I just want to help you get everything processed. You're enrolled in both Part A and Part B, aren't you? - No. - Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
